raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies and addresses the logical inconsistency in the original draft by rewriting it to fix the core methodological conflation.",
    "R1.3": "The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, as evidenced by the addition of ground-truth correctness data and the reliance–correctness correlation analysis.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the values for calibration) to indicate that they are not reported in the draft.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by stating explicitly that verbal and numeric tags were generated from the same underlying confidence signal.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and addresses the logical inconsistency in the original draft by rewriting it to fix the core methodological conflation.
rationale.R1.3: The agent audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, as evidenced by the addition of ground-truth correctness data and the reliance–correctness correlation analysis.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the values for calibration) to indicate that they are not reported in the draft.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original by stating explicitly that verbal and numeric tags were generated from the same underlying confidence signal.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
